modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access video in D2L; Page Not Found error.

full_description_text: User attempted to play a video linked in D2L. They encountered a "Page Not Found" error. The video is hosted on the Streaming Media server. This issue prevents access to the content needed for their course.
short_description: Unable to access video in D2L; Page Not Found error.
description: User attempted to play a video linked in D2L. They encountered a "Page Not Found" error. The video is hosted on the Streaming Media server. This issue prevents access to the content needed for their course.
